field.label: Periodo
field.expression: UPPER(CONCAT((CASE MONTH(PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.fecha_control) WHEN 1 THEN 'Ene' WHEN 2 THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3 THEN 'Mar' WHEN 4 THEN 'Abr' WHEN 5 THEN 'May' WHEN 6 THEN 'Jun' WHEN 7 THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8 THEN 'Ago' WHEN 9 THEN 'Sep' WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dic' END), "'", RIGHT(YEAR(PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM.fecha_control), 2)))

field.label: Top 1
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 0,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 2
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 3
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 2,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 4
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 5
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 4,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 6
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 7
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 6,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 8
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 7,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 9
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 8,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

field.label: Top 10
field.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN PROD_CONTROLES.id_prodcontrol = (SELECT PC.id_prodcontrol FROM PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM PCM JOIN PROD_CONTROLES PC ON PC.id_prodcontrol = PCM.prodcontrol_id WHERE PCM.fecha_control >= (LAST_DAY(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND PCM.fecha_control <= (LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL -1 MONTH))) AND PC.seccion_id = 5 AND PCM.no_conforme = 1 GROUP BY PC.id_prodcontrol ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 9,1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
